name: Chess AI
short_description: A chess game featuring an adaptive AI opponent that scales to your skill level. Analyze your games move-by-move, track your improvement with detailed statistics, and unlock cosmetics for your avatar, board, and pieces as you progress. Original soundtrack by The Teps. No in-app purchases.
detailed_description:
Master the Royal Game

Challenge yourself against an AI that adapts to your skill level — perfect for beginners learning the ropes and veterans seeking a real challenge.

Analyze & Improve

Review your games move-by-move. See where you played brilliantly and where you blundered, with best move suggestions to help you learn.

Level Up Your Style

Track your progress, unlock new boards and piece sets, and customize your avatar with unique clothing and accessories as you climb the ranks.

Features

  • 🎯 Multiple AI difficulty levels

  • 📊 Post-game analysis with move quality ratings

  • 📈 Statistics and progression system

  • 🎨 Unlockable cosmetics for your character, board, and pieces

  • 🎵 Original soundtrack by The Teps

  • 🌍 Multi-language support

  • 💰 No in-app purchases — one payment, full game

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Czech, Dutch, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
